mapper.select: SELECT id, type, name, name_cn AS nameCn, summary, nsfw, air_date AS airDate, score, rank, eps_count AS epsCount, raw_json AS rawJson, synced_at AS syncedAt FROM bangumi_subjects WHERE MATCH(name, name_cn) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY score DESC, rank ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, type, name, name_cn AS nameCn, summary, nsfw, air_date AS airDate, score, rank, eps_count AS epsCount, raw_json AS rawJson, synced_at AS syncedAt FROM bangumi_subjects WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bangumi_subjects ( id, type, name, name_cn, summary, nsfw, air_date, score, rank, eps_count, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{type}, #{name}, #{nameCn}, #{summary}, #{nsfw}, #{airDate}, #{score}, #{rank}, #{epsCount}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE type = VALUES(type), name = VALUES(name), name_cn = VALUES(name_cn), summary = VALUES(summary), nsfw = VALUES(nsfw), air_date = VALUES(air_date), score = VALUES(score), rank = VALUES(rank), eps_count = COALESCE(VALUES(eps_count), eps_count), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
